name: Shuangliang Eco-Energy Systems Co.,Ltd
summary: Shuangliang Eco-Energy Systems Co.,Ltd produces and sells refrigeration, heating, and power systems in China. The company offers polysilicon reduction furnace systems, zero discharge wastewater systems, urban sewage treatment systems, seawater desalination systems, air-cooled condenser systems, refrigeration and heating systems, power generation systems, lithium bromide absorption chiller systems, absorption heat pump waste heat recovery heating systems, industrial waste heat utilization systems, and heat exchange systems. It also offers energy management contracting and hosting services. Shuangliang Eco-Energy Systems Co.,Ltd was founded in 1982 and is based in Jiangyin, China.
